# Sarah Chen

That's me. This note exists because my own notebook needs to reference me too — when a decision trace says "decided by", that "by" is a person node.

- Title: Senior Financial Analyst, Corporate Strategy & FP&A
- Team lead: [Yuki Tanaka](./yuki-tanaka.md)
- Joined ACME: March 2024 (from previous buy-side role at a mid-cap industrials fund)
- Focus areas: competitive analysis, M&A target diligence, valuation modeling
- Owns: [DCF framework](../methodology/dcf-framework.md), this whole vault
